content: Irene Pepperberg, a researcher at Northwestern University, is discovering that a parrot can not only mimic people but also learn the meaning of words.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CM (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Irene Pepperberg, una ricercatrice presso la Northwestern University, sta scoprendo che un pappagallo può non solo imita
